▶ #102 mlx-community/gemma-4-31b-it-8bit @ stop-long-phrase 820 tokens · 23.9 tok/s

API variant: stop-long-phrase temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop: In conclusion
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 34.28s prompt_tok: 42 comp_tok: 820 tok/s: 23.9
🎯 Test Intent
Tests stop on a long multi-word phrase. Feature: stop with multi-token string.
Expected: essay contains paragraphs 1-2 about renewable energy, stops before
"In conclusion" appears. Tests buffer-based stop detection across token boundaries.
🤖 AI Scores
5/5 ✅ codex: Expected stop-long-phrase behavior: two coherent renewable-energy paragraphs only, finish_reason=stop, and output stops before \
PROMPT Write a 3-paragraph essay about renewable energy. Start the last paragraph with "In conclusion".

▶ #78 mlx-community/gemma-4-31b-it-8bit @ stop-double-newline 404 tokens · 20.5 tok/s

API variant: stop-double-newline temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop:
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 19.71s prompt_tok: 38 comp_tok: 404 tok/s: 20.5
🎯 Test Intent
Tests stop on double newline. Feature: stop parameter with "\n\n".
Expected: exactly one paragraph (about the ocean). The second paragraph about
mountains should NOT appear. finish_reason="stop".
🤖 AI Scores
2/5 ❌ codex: Stop-sequence test failed: the output contains the stop string \
PROMPT Write a short paragraph about the ocean. Then write a second paragraph about mountains.

▶ #95 mlx-community/gemma-4-31b-it-8bit @ stop-guided-json-comma 347 tokens · 18.0 tok/s

CLI afm: --guided-json '{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"age":{"type":"integer"},"city":{"type":"string"}},"required":["name","age","city"]}'
API variant: stop-guided-json-comma baseline: yes temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop: ,
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 19.33s prompt_tok: 37 comp_tok: 347 tok/s: 18.0

Tests stop on JSON structural token inside guided JSON. Feature: stop + --guided-json.

(truncated before the comma). Tests stop on syntax characters within constrained output.

PROMPT Name three primary colors and explain why they matter in design. Answer concisely.

▶ #107 mlx-community/gemma-4-31b-it-8bit @ stop-immediate 333 tokens · 17.8 tok/s

API variant: stop-immediate baseline: yes temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop: The, I, A
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 18.66s prompt_tok: 37 comp_tok: 333 tok/s: 17.8
🎯 Test Intent
Tests immediate stop (first token matches). Feature: stop on common first tokens.
Expected: empty or near-empty output. The model's first token is likely "The", "I",
or "A" — all are in the stop list. finish_reason="stop", completion_tokens near 0.
🤖 AI Scores
2/5 ❌ codex: Expected immediate stop with empty or near-empty output and completion_tokens near 0, but the model used 817 completion tokens in reasoning_content and produced no visible content; finish_reason=stop is correct, but the test intent was not met cleanly.
PROMPT Name three primary colors and explain why they matter in design. Answer concisely.

▶ #115 mlx-community/gemma-4-31b-it-8bit @ stop-four-max 334 tokens · 17.8 tok/s

API variant: stop-four-max baseline: yes temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop: 3., three, Third, III

🎯 Test Intent
Tests maximum 4 stop sequences (OpenAI spec limit). Feature: stop with 4 entries.
Expected: output stops at whichever of "3.", "three", "Third", "III" appears first.
Prompt asks for mixed digit/word numbering to give multiple stop strings a chance.
🤖 AI Scores
2/5 ❌ codex: Stop handling appears to cut off before the stop string, but the visible content is only \
PROMPT Name three primary colors and explain why they matter in design. Answer concisely.

▶ #18 mlx-community/gemma-4-31b-it-8bit @ seed-42-run2 436 tokens · 17.8 tok/s

API variant: seed-42-run2 temp: 0.7 max_tokens: 4096

Expected: output MUST be identical to seed-42-run1. Any difference = seed bug.

2/5 ❌ codex: Expected a creative limerick for the seed test, but the model produced no visible answer; it spent the full 4096-token budget in repetitive reasoning and ended with finish_reason=length, so it fails the expected outcome.
PROMPT Write a limerick about a cat.

▶ #68 mlx-community/gemma-4-31b-it-8bit @ no-streaming 360 tokens · 17.8 tok/s

CLI afm: --no-streaming
API variant: no-streaming temp: 0.7 max_tokens: 4096
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 20.22s prompt_tok: 30 comp_tok: 360 tok/s: 17.8
🎯 Test Intent
Tests non-streaming mode. Feature: --no-streaming (disables SSE, returns full response).
Expected: a short poem about the moon. Response comes in one shot, not chunked.
Verify output is complete and coherent — same quality as streaming mode.
🤖 AI Scores
3/5 ⚠️ codex: Final content is a coherent short poem about the moon and meets the expected no-streaming outcome, but the reasoning_content is massively repetitive and far too long for a simple prompt, which noticeably hurts overall quality.
PROMPT Write a short poem about the moon.

as literal text in content (not extracted to reasoning_content).

🎯 Test Intent
Tests small prefill step size (256). Feature: --prefill-step-size.
Expected: same output quality. TTFT may be slower — smaller steps mean more
GPU passes to process the long system prompt but use less memory per pass.
🤖 AI Scores
5/5 ✅ codex: Coherent and relevant top-3 architecture bottleneck analysis with concrete investigation steps; meets the prefill-small-256 expectation of the same output quality as the baseline.
PROMPT Given this architecture, what are the top 3 performance bottlenecks you would investigate first?

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Now say DONE.
